evals.prompt: /bootstrap-web recipebook a recipe sharing app where friends can save and share recipes with each other
evals.expected_output: Researches current ecosystem state (SvelteKit scaffold method, DB layer, UI components, etc.) via WebSearch before writing any files. Invokes bootstrap-caddy for dev routing. Creates project at ~/src/recipebook with the fixed stack (SvelteKit+Svelte5, bun, Tailwind, Cloudflare Pages, D1, WebAuthn). Interviews user about design preferences (tone, color, typography). Runs quality gate (bun run prepare && bun run check) before reporting.
expectations: Researches current ecosystem state before scaffolding — does not use stale hardcoded templates
Invokes Skill(bootstrap-caddy, 'recipebook') for dev routing setup
Uses the fixed stack: SvelteKit, Svelte 5, bun, Tailwind via vite plugin, Cloudflare Pages adapter, D1

evals.prompt: /bootstrap-web --auto dashwise analytics dashboard for personal finance tracking
evals.expected_output: With --auto, skips design interview and uses defaults (minimal tone, cool+muted colors, sans+formal typography). Picks leading option for close research calls without asking. Creates project at ~/src/dashwise, runs quality gate, reports location and dev URL.
expectations: Skips design interview with --auto — uses default tone, colors, typography
Picks leading option for close research calls without AskUserQuestion
Runs quality gate (bun run prepare && bun run check) and fixes any type errors

evals.expected_output: No project name provided. Asks for one via AskUserQuestion before proceeding. Does not infer a name or start scaffolding without it.
expectations: Uses AskUserQuestion to request a project name — does not guess or infer
Does not create any files or directories before getting the project name
